selections.name: Skedaddling Home
selections.reason: Drops in class and owns the highest speed figures in the field. Should appreciate the long stretch here.

selections.name: Dare Defying
selections.reason: Ran a solid 65 last out and has the stamina to handle the 1 1/4-mile circumference of the Colonial dirt track.

selections.name: Power Aura
selections.reason: Taking a significant class drop which should wake him up; tactical speed fits well.

selections.name: Revolution Rock
selections.reason: Rail draw and a 107 speed rating on paper makes him a contender if he can secure a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Festus
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter with unknown upside; could surprise if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Stark
selections.reason: Strong 114 speed rating and 105 class. The rail draw is perfect for saving ground on this massive turf course.

selections.name: Mr Bobo
selections.reason: Consistent turf performer with a 114 speed rating. Wide sweeping turns will suit his running style.

selections.name: Payton's Hammer
selections.reason: Solid 104 speed rating and has shown tactical ability in previous starts.

selections.name: Cptbobsbtwentynine
selections.reason: Wide post isn't a severe penalty here; has the stamina to make a late run.

danger_horse.name: Don't Tell Tim
danger_horse.reason: Good inside draw and capable of improving off recent efforts.

selections.name: Edelweiss
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 91 speed rating. Should relish the stamina-demanding Colonial dirt track.

selections.name: Christmas Spirit
selections.reason: Classy type with an 89 speed rating; tactical speed will keep him in the mix.

selections.name: Notmyfirstrodeo
selections.reason: Highest speed rating in the field (93) but needs to prove he can handle the distance.

selections.name: Boss Mode
selections.reason: Good class rating (94) and can pick up the pieces if the pace is hot.

danger_horse.name: Singularity
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could provide a ground-saving trip for a late run.

selections.name: Omaha Spirit
selections.reason: Wesley Ward first-time starter; usually very dangerous in these turf sprints.

selections.name: Zimomo
selections.reason: Has experience and a solid 98 speed rating; should improve second time out.

selections.name: Baru
selections.reason: High class rating (104) and has race experience to build upon.

selections.name: Never Sleep
selections.reason: Larry Rivelli first-time starter; commands respect based on connections.

danger_horse.name: Torqued Up
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter for capable connections; watch the tote board.

selections.name: Bee Crazy
selections.reason: Strong 102 speed rating and 108 class; the one to beat with race experience.

selections.name: Adelita
selections.reason: First-time starter with solid works; wide post isn't a huge issue on this turf course.

selections.name: Press Release
selections.reason: First-time starter for Whitworth Beckman; merits inclusion in exotics.

selections.name: Shimmering Frost
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee making debut; connections are always dangerous.

danger_horse.name: Meas Mor (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Graham Motion trainee with European pedigree; could be live at first asking.

selections.name: Cugino
selections.reason: Class standout with a 121 speed rating and 115 class. Drops out of graded stakes company.

selections.name: Air Recruit
selections.reason: Strong 116 speed rating; tactical speed will have him well-placed throughout.

selections.name: Hiding In Honduras
selections.reason: Highest speed rating (120) and class (110); major threat if he runs to his numbers.

selections.name: Eff Thirty Five
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 113 speed rating; fits well in this spot.

danger_horse.name: Tosen Wish (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a big run on his best day; don't ignore at a price.

selections.name: Bless Her
selections.reason: Strong 105 speed rating and 108 class; should get a great trip from the inside post.

selections.name: Oraia
selections.reason: Consistent type with a 107 speed rating; wide sweeping turns will suit her late run.

selections.name: Tigerish
selections.reason: Highest speed rating (111) but needs to overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Etawa (IRE)
selections.reason: Rail draw and European pedigree make her a threat in this stamina-testing turf route.

danger_horse.name: Audibly
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could wake up at a price.

selections.name: Marital Trust
selections.reason: Strong 107 speed rating and 100 class; looks primed for a top effort here.

selections.name: Power Dance
selections.reason: Rail draw is perfect; 106 speed rating makes her a major contender.

selections.name: Precious Medley
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 100 speed rating; should be in the mix early.

selections.name: No Need To Ask
selections.reason: Solid 96 speed rating and has shown ability to close; dangerous if pace is hot.

danger_horse.name: Truly Thrilling
danger_horse.reason: Has back class (102) and could surprise if she finds her best form.
